findings: The hook gives a concrete reason to care about slope before introducing the formula.
The order-matching trap directly targets a common sign and coordinate-order mistake.
The two pause problems are answerable from the lesson and have visible answer reveals.
The final path gives students concrete next actions in the Learn Portal.
watch_points: Slide 06 is denser than the rest; keep narration slow there during final video review.
Students who struggle with coordinate planes may need advisor follow-up after Module 9.
